title: Pdfium heap-buffer-overflow in sycc422_to_rgb
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
With a PDF file containing a malformed JPEG2000 image, it is possible to cause an out-of-bounds read in the openjpeg library used in pdfium.  
The code in question, shortened for brevity (from fx_codec_jpx_opj.cpp:216):  
  
for (i = 0; i < maxh; ++i) {  
	for (j = 0; (O
